loginToRead: Log in or register to read

anonReader.notFoundBody: This story doesn't exist or has been removed.
anonReader.nc17Gate: This story is rated NC-17 (explicit content). You'll need to log in or register to read it.

report.failed: Couldn't send that report. Please try again.

privacy.title: Scriptorium
privacy.introAdult: Catalog preferences for long-form stories. Anonymous viewers see up to R; signed-in viewers see every rating and get a splash warning before opening mature content.
privacy.alwaysHideHint: Cards carrying any of these warnings are hidden from the catalog entirely. Not blurred, just gone.

G.description: Family-friendly. No violence beyond cartoon-level, no sexual content, no harsh language. Suitable for any reader.

PG.description: Brief mild language, comic-style action, light romantic content (hand-holding, a kiss). Some scary moments without lasting harm.

PG-13.description: Moderate violence, occasional strong language, brief partial nudity or suggestive scenes without explicit depiction. Action with consequences; conflict with stakes.

R.description: Strong violence, harsh language, sexual content and nudity. Acts may occur on the page but are NOT depicted in explicit detail, that's NC-17 territory. Publicly readable; readers expect mature situations.

NC-17.description: Graphic sexual content and / or extreme gore. Depicted in explicit detail rather than implied. Cards stay listed in the public catalog so the work exists in the index, but opening the story requires an account.

collab.inviteHint: Invite someone above to share the story.
collab.ownerNote: The owner is the only role that can manage collaborators and delete the story.

bookshelf.title: From the Scriptorium
bookshelf.subtitle: hover or tap a volume to draw it from the shelf
bookshelf.placeholderAria: Write your story, sign in or register

codex.emptyNoEntries: No codex entries yet. Add a character, location, or plot point on the left.

codex.pubChipTitle: Surfaces in the reader's Cast & Places appendix

linkedWorld.morePages_one: + {{count}} more pages, open in World viewer for the full tree.

codex.publicLabel: Public, surfaces in the story's reader Cast & Places appendix.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.cantReviewOwn: You can't review your own story. You can pin or hide any review below.
reviews.alreadyReviewed: You've already reviewed this story. (Within 60 seconds of posting, you could still edit it.)
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to share what you think.
reviews.editWindowNote: You have 60 seconds to edit after posting.

catalog.title: Scriptorium
catalog.emptyPage: Nothing on this page, try Reset.
catalog.signInNc17: Sign in to see NC-17 stories.
catalog.noStoriesYet: You haven't started a story yet.
catalog.readingEmpty: Stories you start reading will show up here so you can pick them back up.
catalog.followingEmpty: Stories you follow will show up here. Open a story and tap Follow to get notified on new chapters.
catalog.nc17CardTitle: Rated NC-17, log in or register to read
catalog.buyToReadChipTitle: Buy a copy to read past a sample

buy.copyAddedProfile: Copy added to your Library (−{{price}}). Open it to show it on your profile.
buy.unlockedCopyAdded: Unlocked! Copy added to your Library (−{{price}}).
buy.buyTitle: Buy a copy for {{price}}, adds it to your profile Library
buy.buyBarTitle: Buy a copy for {{price}} (adds it to your profile Library)
buy.showingTitle: Showing on your profile, tap to hide
buy.ownedTitle: You own this, tap to show it on your profile

editor.confirmDeleteStory_one: Delete "{{title}}"? This cascades to all {{count}} chapter(s) and any reading positions. Cannot be undone.
editor.confirmDeleteStory_other: Delete "{{title}}"? This cascades to all {{count}} chapter(s) and any reading positions. Cannot be undone.
editor.postingAsHint: Pick a character to publish in-character. You can change this later.
editor.startsPrivateNote: Starts as a private draft. Fill out the rest, write a chapter, then switch it to public when you're ready.
editor.priceRangeError: Price must be a whole number between {{min}} and {{max}}.
editor.synopsisLabel: Synopsis, shown on the story landing page
editor.synopsisPlaceholder: A longer pitch, the hook that gets readers to start chapter 1.
editor.ratingFieldLabel: Rating, sets who can read this story
editor.copyPriceHelp: What readers pay to buy a copy and showcase your book on their profile (you earn a royalty on each sale). Leave blank to use the site default ({{price}}g). A custom price must be {{min}}–{{max}}g.
editor.buyToReadHint: Readers see a short sample of the first chapter, then must buy a copy (at the price above) to read the rest. Moderators can read it in full with a warning.
editor.noChaptersYet: No chapters yet, add one to start writing.
editor.pickChapter: Pick a chapter on the left to edit.
editor.confirmUnpublish: Unpublish this chapter? Subscribers won't see it on the catalog or in the reader until it's republished.
editor.confirmPublish: Publish this chapter? Subscribers will be notified and it'll show up in the reader.
editor.readOnlyNote: You're in read-only mode so you don't overwrite their work.
editor.forceEditingNote: Force-editing while {{name}} is in the chapter. Both versions are kept in history.
editor.divergenceWarning: ⚠ Someone saved this chapter since you opened it.
editor.divergenceNote: Your unsaved edits will overwrite theirs unless you reload.
editor.dismissTitle: Hide this warning until another save happens
editor.notesPlaceholder: Notes shown above or below the chapter, context, citations, dedications...
editor.pickVersion: Pick a version on the left.

reader.contentsTitle: Contents: chapters, codex, buy a copy
reader.paywallBypassed: ⚠️ This book is marked <0>Buy to Read</0>. You're viewing it in full via moderator access. Readers must buy a copy to read past a sample.
reader.noPublishedChapters: This story has no published chapters yet.
reader.buyToReadChipTitle: Readers buy a copy to read past a sample
reader.tipPageless: Tip: scroll to read; toggle Book mode for paged view.
reader.followingTitle: You'll be notified when a new chapter publishes
reader.followTitle: Get notified when a new chapter publishes
reader.followingInAppTitle: You'll get an in-app notification on new chapters
reader.pushOnTitle: Browser notifications are on for this story. Tap to turn them off.
reader.pushOffTitle: Also send a browser notification when a new chapter publishes.
reader.reportPrompt: Why are you reporting this story? (optional)
reader.reportSubmitted: Report submitted. Thanks for flagging it.
reader.lockedCta_one: This is a preview. Buy a copy to read all {{count}} chapter. It's added to your Library and you can show it on your profile.
reader.lockedCta_other: This is a preview. Buy a copy to read all {{count}} chapters. It's added to your Library and you can show it on your profile.
reader.stubMatureSignIn: This story carries a mature rating. Sign in to view stories marked R or NC-17.
reader.stubAdultsOnly: This story is rated for adults and can't be viewed from your account.
reader.stubPrivate: This story is private. Only the author can see it.
